synopsis:
*Fortune and Fate, Part 4: The Deal*

**Ring of Fire!**

Trapped and betrayed, Doctor Aphra fights to escape the cursed city of Vaale before madness overcomes her! Meanwhile, Ronen Tagge's sinister plan for the Rings of Vaale approaches fruition. Will Aphra be able to thwart him in time?
title: Doctor Aphra (2020) #04
